source_jobs.title: Engineering Intern
source_jobs.description:
About Roam

Roam is an Applied AI lab building World Models for highly retentive 3D environments. We're lifting models from the 2D plane of pixels into the full dimensionality of interactive worlds. Our work spans everything required to perceive, reason about, and create in 3D, with applications across simulation, design, and play.

Our first focus is gaming: 3D environment generation and understanding for interactive entertainment, technology that enables millions of people to explore, create, and share highly engaging worlds together.



Similar to how TikTok turned everyone into a creator through easy-to-use tools, we will let everyone turn their ideas into games without needing any technical skills.

Since founding earlier this year, we have:

 - Locked in 1,000+ gaming & livestream creators (100 K–10 M followers each) who will launch Roam games to an aggregate reach of 250 M+ fans.

 - Assembled a 12 person applied AI team spanning ByteDance Seed, Nous Research, OpenCSG, NASA (multi-agent workflows, world simulation), second-time technical founders, engineers that shipped 100+ games for Voodoo and Supersonic and built mobile apps from 0–2M DAUs.

 - Raised an unannounced round from investors behind Google Deepmind, Bytedance, Anduril, Together AI and Polymarket, founders & large content creators.

 - Acquired a consumer product studio with 11.5M+ downloads.



About the Role:

You’ll work at the intersection of applied AI and large-scale systems, focusing on world generation pipelines, data-efficient training methods, and inference-time optimization for real-time generation. Your work will enable everyone make, play and monetize highly engaging games & 3D environments. This will include:

 - Architect and implement game generation pipelines powered by LLMs and advanced agentic chains

 - Optimize game iteration cycles, model accuracy, and generation speed across mobile and cloud stacks

 - Scale the product

 - Build feedback loops that learn from player & self-play actions to auto-test and improve games in real time

 - Deliver context-aware creation via multi-turn dialogue and fine-grained parameter control


We’re looking for engineers who have:

 1. Built & scaled products with agents: Orchestrated multi-agent tool-calling with memory and planning, shipped to real users with live evals, tracing/observability.

 2. Ran LLM post-training: Curated clean preference data, automated data pipelines, and built eval harnesses.

 3. Built fast growing products: solo or with a friend launched products that grew to 1000s of users. Owned onboarding and growth loops and drove retention.

 4. Worked on GPU optimization & CUDA kernels: and similar.
    

Responsibilities:

 - Architect and implement game generation pipelines powered by LLMs and advanced agentic chains

 - Optimize game iteration cycles, model accuracy, and generation speed across mobile and cloud stacks

 - Scale the product

 - Build feedback loops that learn from player & self-play actions to auto-test and improve games in real time

 - Deliver context-aware creation via multi-turn dialogue and fine-grained parameter control
   

Strong candidates may also have:

 - Significant experience in software engineering and applied AI

 - 1+ year full time experience at a hypergrowth startup
   
   
   

Compensation:

 - $150 an hour. Successful candidates might be offered a Full Time offer.

 - Free housing, food, and transportation.



Growth Opportunity

You’ll join a mission-driven team working at the frontier of AI world generation. We're HQ'd in SF and currently work all week around. In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to:

 - Own large parts of Roam’s core generation and simulation stack spanning from multimodal data pipelines to agent orchestration and engagement modeling.

 - Define new benchmarks for fun, retention, and interactive intelligence in 3D worlds using behavioral data across thousands of environments.

 - Ship alongside a team that has already b

source_jobs.title: Research Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Roam

Roam is an Applied AI lab building World Models for highly retentive 3D environments. We're lifting models from the 2D plane of pixels into the full dimensionality of interactive worlds. Our work spans everything required to perceive, reason about, and create in 3D, with applications across simulation, design, and play.

Our first focus is gaming: 3D environment generation and understanding for interactive entertainment, technology that enables millions of people to explore, create, and share highly engaging worlds together.




Similar to how TikTok turned everyone into a creator through easy-to-use tools, we will let everyone turn their ideas into games without needing any technical skills.

Since founding earlier this year, we have:

 - Locked in 1,000+ gaming & livestream creators (100 K–10 M followers each) who will launch Roam games to an aggregate reach of 250 M+ fans.

 - Assembled a 12 person applied AI team spanning Ex-Moonshot (post-training & agents, diffusion model training), second-time technical founders, engineers that made 100+ games for Voodoo, Supersonic, Sidemen and built mobile apps from 0–2M DAUs.

 - Raised an unannounced round from investors behind Google Deepmind, Bytedance, Anduril, Together AI and Polymarket, angels from OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Deepmind, Cognition, & large content creators.

 - Acquired a consumer product studio with 11.5M+ downloads.



About the Role:

You’ll work at the intersection of applied AI and large-scale systems, focusing on world generation pipelines, data-efficient training methods, and inference-time optimization for real-time generation. Your work will enable everyone make, play and monetize highly engaging games & 3D environments. Our current research spans:

 - Distributed multi-agent orchestration systems for coordinated world synthesis, spanning terrain generation, asset population, and behavior trees

 - Reinforcement learning pipelines for adaptive, open-ended game generation with hierarchical action spaces and dynamic difficulty adjustment

 - Agentic codegen & diffusion-based tooling for creating studio quality simulated environments



We’re looking for engineers who have:

 - Strong software fundamentals and comfort switching between production systems and research

 - Experience building or training large multimodal or agentic systems

 - Familiarity with distributed training, data curation, or large-scale vision/3D pipelines at scale

 - Bonus: Have worked on generative vision, world models, or RL systems.

Strong candidates may also have:

 - Experience training or fine-tuning diffusion or other generative vision models.

 - Prior work in robotics, multi-agent systems, or simulation-based RL.

 - Familiarity with game engines or 3D simulation frameworks as experimental testbeds.

Compensation:

 - Base salary of $200,000 – $350,000, + $165,750- $353,250 equity and benefits.

 - Free housing, food, and transportation.

 - Visa Sponsorship & relocation support.



Growth Opportunity

You’ll join a mission-driven team working at the frontier of AI world generation. We're HQ'd in SF and currently work in an intense 996. In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to:

 - Own large parts of Roam’s core generation and simulation stack spanning from multimodal data pipelines to agent orchestration and engagement modeling.

 - Define new benchmarks for fun, retention, and interactive intelligence in 3D worlds using behavioral data across thousands of environments.

 - Ship alongside a team that has already built products for 13M+ users, with 1000+ large creators ready to deploy our technology.



If you're excited to move fast, build at the edge of what's possible, and help define how AI inhabits 3D worlds, let's talk.

About Roam

Roam is an Applied AI lab building World Models for highly retentive 3D environments. We're lifting models from the 2D plane of pixels into the full dimensionality of interactive worlds. Our work spans everything required to perceive, reason about, and create in 3D, with applications across simulation, design, and play.



Similar to how TikTok turned everyone into a creator through easy-to-use tools, we will let everyone turn their ideas into games without needing any technical skills.

Since founding earlier this year, we have:

 - Locked in 1,000+ gaming & livestream creators (100 K–10 M followers each) who will launch Roam games to an aggregate reach of 250 M+ fans.

 - Assembled a 10 person applied AI team spanning ByteDance Seed, NASA (multi-agent workflows, world simulation), second-time technical founders, engineers that shipped 100+ games for Voodoo and Supersonic and built mobile apps from 0–2M DAUs.

 - Raised an unannounced round from investors behind Google Deepmind, Bytedance, Anduril, Together AI and Polymarket, founders & large content creators.

 - Acquired a consumer product studio with 11.5M+ downloads.


About the Role:

We're looking to hire the best [you tell us] in the world to help us build AI systems that let anyone create games.

If you're interested in bringing game making to the masses, please apply.



Requirements

 - Demonstrate what you do exceptionally and that you deserve a role at Roam

 - Willing to live/work full-time in San Francisco, CA

source_jobs.title: Platform Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Roam

Roam is an Applied AI lab building World Models for highly retentive 3D environments. We're lifting models from the 2D plane of pixels into the full dimensionality of interactive worlds. Our work spans everything required to perceive, reason about, and create in 3D, with applications across simulation, design, and play.

Our first focus is gaming: 3D environment generation and understanding for interactive entertainment, technology that enables millions of people to explore, create, and share highly engaging worlds together.



Similar to how TikTok turned everyone into a creator through easy-to-use tools, we will let everyone turn their ideas into games without needing any technical skills.

Since founding earlier this year, we have:

 - Locked in 1,000+ gaming & livestream creators (100 K–10 M followers each) who will launch Roam games to an aggregate reach of 250 M+ fans.

 - Assembled a 12 person applied AI team spanning ByteDance Seed, Nous Research, NASA (multi-agent workflows, diffusion model training), second-time technical founders, engineers that made 100+ games for Voodoo and Supersonic and built mobile apps from 0–2M DAUs.

 - Raised an unannounced round from investors behind Google Deepmind, Bytedance, Anduril, Together AI and Polymarket, angels from OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Windsurf & large content creators.

 - Acquired a consumer product studio with 11.5M+ downloads.



About the Role:

You’ll work at the intersection of applied AI and large-scale platform engineering. Your focus will be on building and owning the core infrastructure, platforms, and toolchains that power our AI-driven generation tools. Our current engineering focus spans:

 - Architect and automate self-serve developer platforms: build pipelines for LLM‑powered game generation, asset integration, and production-ready toolchains.

 - Design integrations across 3D engines, iOS/mobile, and cloud systems to speed up iteration and deployment.

 - Instrument automated testing and feedback systems that learn from both self-play and user behavior, accelerating bug detection and product polish.

 - Own new platform features end-to-end —from design to production, ensuring reliability, scalability, and developer usability.

 - Quickly assess and refine Roam’s existing architecture, enforce clear service contracts, and eliminate deployment friction in your first week.
   
   

We’re looking for engineers who have:

 - Scaled AWS (Lambda, SQS, S3, EC2, IAM, DynamoDB), and multiplier backend infra.

 - Deep fluency in sql, nosql, python.

 - Significant experience in software engineering and in applied AI.

 - Comfort with Vector DBs (Pinecone, OpenSearch) and semantic search systems.

 - 1+ year full time experience at a hypergrowth startup.

Strong candidates may also have:

 - Training and finetuning diffusion and language models

 - Work in research and robotics

 - Experience with Game Development, 3D engines / Shaderlab

Compensation:

 - Base salary of $180,000 – $400,000, and 0.25% - 1% equity.

 - Free housing, food, and transportation.

 - Visa Sponsorship & relocation support.



Growth Opportunity

You’ll join a mission-driven team working at the frontier of AI world generation. We're HQ'd in SF and currently work 7 days a week. In this role, you’ll have the opportunity to:

 - Own Roam’s infrastructure, devops and training setups.

 - Define new benchmarks for fun, retention, and interactive intelligence in 3D worlds using behavioral data across thousands of environments.

 - Ship alongside a team that has already built products for 13M+ users, with 1000+ large creators ready to deploy our technology.



If you're excited to move fast, build at the edge of what's possible, and help define how AI inhabits 3D worlds, let's talk.

notes: Applied AI lab with focus on 3D environment generation and understanding
